content: Self-Refine’s output-focused iterative polishing and Reflexion’s dynamic memory-backed self-reflection can be combined to create a two-layer self-improvement architecture for autonomous agents, where Self-Refine refines concrete task outputs while Reflexion accumulates high-level behavioral lessons to shape future refinement iterations. This creates a recursive improvement loop that outperforms either approach alone by separating low-output polishing from long-term strategy learning.
